name: taskspace
description: Hierarchical task coordination demo. Tasks are $note descendants: name is the listing/title, text is the markdown description, and the inherited description slot stays cosmetic. v0.3 drops the v0.2 own-property shadows of title/description in favor of the canonical $note slots.

classes.description: Base class for spaces that coordinate hierarchical work.

verbs.name: create_task
verbs.source: verb :create_task(name, text) rx { let task = create($task, { owner: actor, name: name }); task.parent_task = null; task.space = this; this.root_tasks = this.root_tasks + [task]; move(task, this); observe({ type: "task_created", task: task, parent: null, name: name, text: text }); task:set_text(text); return task; }

verbs.name: list_tasks
verbs.source: verb :list_tasks() rxd { let out = []; for t in contents(this) { if (isa(t, $task) && t.space == this) { let text = ""; try { text = t:text(); } except err { text = ""; } out = out + [{ id: t, name: t.name, text: text, status: t.status, assignee: t.assignee, parent_task: t.parent_task }]; } } return out; }

classes.description: Base class for taskspace work items. Tasks are $note descendants — name is the listing identity, text is the markdown description, and the inherited cosmetic description slot is left empty by default. The task adds parent/subtask wiring, claim/status lifecycle, requirements, artifacts, and messages on top of the note shape.

verbs.name: add_subtask
verbs.source: verb :add_subtask(name, text) rx { let child = create($task, { owner: actor, name: name }); child.parent_task = this; child.space = this.space; this.subtasks = this.subtasks + [child]; move(child, this.space); observe({ type: "task_created", task: child, parent: this, name: name, text: text }); observe({ type: "subtask_added", parent: this, child: child, index: length(this.subtasks) - 1 }); child:set_text(text); return child; }

verbs.name: move
verbs.source: verb :move(parent, index) rx { if (parent == this) { raise { code: "E_RECMOVE", message: "recursive task move" }; } let stack = this.subtasks; while (length(stack) > 0) { let child = stack[1]; if (child == parent) { raise { code: "E_RECMOVE", message: "recursive task move" }; } let rest = []; let stack_i = 1; for stack_item in stack { if (stack_i > 1) { rest = rest + [stack_item]; } stack_i = stack_i + 1; } stack = rest + child.subtasks; } if (parent != null && parent.space != this.space) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "cross-taskspace move is not supported" }; } if (index < 0) { raise { code: "E_RANGE", message: "task move index out of range", value: index }; } let from = this.parent_task; let without = []; let base = []; if (from == null) { for item in this.space.root_tasks { if (item != this) { without = without + [item]; } } } else { for item in from.subtasks { if (item != this) { without = without + [item]; } } } if (parent == null) { base = this.space.root_tasks; } else { base = parent.subtasks; } let cleaned = []; for item in base { if (item != this) { cleaned = cleaned + [item]; } } if (from == parent) { cleaned = without; } if (index > length(cleaned)) { raise { code: "E_RANGE", message: "task move index out of range", value: index }; } let next = []; let i = 0; let inserted = false; for item in cleaned { if (i == index) { next = next + [this]; inserted = true; } next = next + [item]; i = i + 1; } if (!inserted) { next = next + [this]; } if (from == null) { this.space.root_tasks = without; } else { from.subtasks = without; } if (parent == null) { this.space.root_tasks = next; } else { parent.subtasks = next; } this.parent_task = parent; observe({ type: "task_moved", task: this, from_parent: from, to_parent: parent, index: index }); return this; }

verbs.name: claim
verbs.source: verb :claim() rx { if (this.assignee == actor) { return this; } if (this.assignee != null) { raise { code: "E_CONFLICT", message: "task already claimed", value: this.assignee }; } this.assignee = actor; this.status = "claimed"; observe({ type: "task_claimed", task: this, actor: actor }); return this; }

verbs.name: release
verbs.source: verb :release() rx { if (this.assignee != null && this.assignee != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only assignee or wizard can release" }; } this.assignee = null; if (this.status != "done") { this.status = "open"; } observe({ type: "task_released", task: this }); return this; }

verbs.name: set_status
verbs.source: verb :set_status(status) rx { let allowed = ["open", "claimed", "in_progress", "blocked", "done"]; if (!(status in allowed)) { raise { code: "E_INVARG", message: "invalid task status", value: status }; } if (status != "done" && this.assignee != null && this.assignee != actor && !has_flag(actor, "wizard")) { raise { code: "E_PERM", message: "only assignee or wizard can set status" }; } let from = this.status; this.status = status; observe({ type: "status_changed", task: this, from: from, to: status }); if (status == "done") { let unchecked = []; for req in this.requirements { if (req["checked"] != true) { unchecked = unchecked + [req["text"]]; } } if (length(unchecked) > 0) { observe({ type: "done_premature", task: this, unchecked: unchecked }); } } return status; }

verbs.name: add_requirement
verbs.source: verb :add_requirement(text) rx { this.requirements = this.requirements + [{ text: text, checked: false }]; observe({ type: "requirement_added", task: this, index: length(this.requirements) - 1, text: text }); return length(this.requirements) - 1; }

verbs.name: check_requirement
verbs.source: verb :check_requirement(index, checked) rx { if (index < 0 || index >= length(this.requirements)) { raise { code: "E_RANGE", message: "requirement index out of range", value: index }; } let next = []; let i = 0; for req in this.requirements { if (i == index) { next = next + [{ text: req["text"], checked: checked }]; } else { next = next + [req]; } i = i + 1; } this.requirements = next; observe({ type: "requirement_checked", task: this, index: index, checked: checked }); return checked; }

verbs.name: add_message
verbs.source: verb :add_message(body) rx { let ts = now(); let msg = { actor: actor, ts: ts, body: body }; this.messages = this.messages + [msg]; observe({ type: "message_added", task: this, actor: actor, body: body, ts: ts }); return msg; }

verbs.name: add_artifact
verbs.source: verb :add_artifact(ref) rx { let ts = now(); let artifact = { kind: ref["kind"], ref: ref["ref"], added_by: actor, added_at: ts }; this.artifacts = this.artifacts + [artifact]; observe({ type: "artifact_attached", task: this, ref: artifact }); return artifact; }

seed_hooks.name: Taskspace
seed_hooks.description: The first runnable task coordination space. It owns the sequenced timeline and anchored task tree used by people or agents to create, claim, discuss, and complete work.
